response.justification: Szabo brings strong engineering fundamentals and is actively working on MCP and agentic infrastructure at Acme Software—directly addressing key technologies for the role. However, he falls significantly short of the minimum 8 years building production AI solutions, with only ~13 months of AI-focused work. Critical gaps include no demonstrated Python expertise, no track record with data pipelines or vector databases, and unclear customer-facing technical leadership experience. The recent pivot is promising but too early-stage to meet a staff-level GenAI requirement.
strengths: Current role includes MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, directly addressing key technical stack for the position
Proven staff-level individual contributor across multiple organizations with TypeScript expertise and cloud infrastructure experience (AWS CDK, microservices at scale)
Demonstrated mentoring and knowledge-sharing across technical domains through workshops, teaching, and organizational leadership
concerns: Only ~13 months of AI-focused work experience; job requires minimum 8 years building production-grade AI solutions—a 7-year gap
No explicit Python expertise or demonstrated experience with data pipelines, vector databases, or RAG architectures—critical for the role
Customer-facing technical discovery and stakeholder leadership experience not clearly evidenced; resume emphasizes technical contributions over client engagement

key_factors.factor: Current MCP and agentic infrastructure work
Missing Python and data pipeline expertise
